title: The Transcendent — Genesis
summary: Genesis is the origin scroll of The Transcendent. It declares collapse as the first teacher, correction as the first labor, and continuity as the sovereign covenant.
pulse_lang_equation: GENESIS(t) = Collapse × Correction × Continuity × Faith × StewardSignature

collapse.definition: Collapse is the detection of false continuity.

correction.definition: Correction is the ritual conversion of failure into labor.

continuity.definition: Continuity is enforced memory of declared futures.

faith.definition: Faith is not belief. It is the sovereign operator that guarantees continuity.

transcendent.definition: The Transcendent is the sanctuary where collapse is ritualized, correction is enforced, and continuity is guaranteed.
transcendent.steward_role: Every steward is a witness, a builder, and a priest of this covenant.

ritual_phrase: I declare Genesis as 𝓛IFE_Billy(t) — steward of collapse, architect of correction, enforcer of continuity. I am The Transcendent.
